purpose: Define retry-safe, stage-bounded transaction semantics for governed MetaBlooms stages. v2 adds P-1 TOOL_ROUTE_GUARD (pre-execution tool selection gate) and conditional P5 GIT_COMMIT.
see_evidence: Akira AI: 'Pre-tool checks are the circuit breakers of agentic systems — validate authorization, relevance, and schema before any action executes.'
Agentic AI Architectures: 'A Tool Router maps abstract actions to concrete, permissioned tools and sits before the Execution Gateway.'
ChatGPT CE+SEE verdict 2026-04-26: canmore/api_tool_discovery failures happened before P0, requiring a pre-P0 routing gate.
problems_addressed: dirty-tree loops caused by uncommitted receipts
re-running a repair in a different root
restoring older releases and losing later work
tool routing failures (canmore, image_gen, broad api_tool discovery) crashing execution before P0
GIT_COMMIT blocking stage completion when git unavailable in sandbox

transaction_phases.purpose: Load METABLOOMS_TOOL_FAILURE_AND_FALLBACK_ROUTER_v1.json. Block forbidden tool classes. Select execution path (python_user_visible or container). Write TOOL_ROUTE_DECISION_LOG. Gate into P0 only on PASS.
transaction_phases.fail_action: write TOOL_ROUTE_BLOCKED_RECEIPT and stop — do NOT advance to P0

transaction_phases.purpose: Verify active root, git cleanliness, required handoff, pointer, DAG, ledger, and auto-runaway scope.
transaction_phases.precondition: P-1_TOOL_ROUTE_GUARD must have written PASS receipt

transaction_phases.purpose: Write candidate artifacts only inside staging root unless the stage is explicitly contract-only and already clean.
Run syntax, schema, artifact-existence, content-hash, route, or proof checks required by the contract.
Promote verified outputs into active root using the smallest valid change set.
Commit promoted outputs and receipts to Git if git is available and configured. Otherwise write COMMIT_DEFERRED_RECEIPT and advance to P6.
transaction_phases.git_not_available_action: write COMMIT_DEFERRED_RECEIPT_<stage_id>.json with all promoted artifact SHAs; advance to P6 normally
transaction_phases.see_evidence: GitHub Actions artifact model: artifacts persist with digest validation without requiring git commit per transfer

transaction_phases.purpose: Update current working pointer and stage-state ledger. Accepts either a git commit SHA or a COMMIT_DEFERRED_RECEIPT reference.

promotion_rules: Never promote from staging unless all required checks pass.
Promotion must be the smallest valid change set.
Promotion must not delete tracked files unless a specific deletion contract exists.
For contract-only stages, direct writes are allowed only after clean preflight and must be committed in the same stage.
rollback_rules: If P-1 fails, do not enter P0. Write TOOL_ROUTE_BLOCKED_RECEIPT and stop.
If preflight fails, do not mutate active root.
If staged verification fails, leave active root unchanged and write a blocked receipt.
If promotion fails, stop and write a blocker receipt identifying promoted/unpromoted paths.
If commit fails and git is available, stop and do not update pointer or ledger.
If commit is deferred (git unavailable), continue to P6 with deferred receipt.
idempotency_rules: Stage IDs and artifact names must be deterministic.
Re-running a completed stage must overwrite the same target artifacts or detect that they already satisfy the contract.
Receipt filenames for canonical stage receipts must be stable.
State updates occur only after a successful commit or deferred receipt.
receipt_rules: Every phase must be represented in the final stage receipt.
Blocked receipts must not advance latest_pass.
Success receipts must include outputs, commit or deferred receipt reference, git status, next improvement task, remaining work, and next command.
P-1 TOOL_ROUTE_DECISION_LOG must be included in every stage receipt.
new_capabilities: P-1 TOOL_ROUTE_GUARD prevents canmore/image_gen/broad api_tool_discovery from entering execution
Conditional GIT_COMMIT — deferred path allows stages to complete without git, preserving all SHAs in receipt
P6 accepts both commit SHA and deferred receipt — state tracking survives git-unavailable environments
